title: Khaitan & Co acts on HFCL ₹555 crore preferential issue
description: HFCL Limited is set to make a preferential issue of 7,50,00,000 warrants aggregating to ₹555 crore to the Promoter and Promoter Group.Khaitan & Co is advising HFCL on this preferential issue of warrants.The transaction team consisted of Sudhir Bassi (Executive Director) and Vaibhav Mittal (Partner).HFCLHFCL is a technology company specializing in the design, development, and manufacturing of telecommunications equipment, fiber-optic cables, and related products.
